mapper.insert: insert into product(name, category_id, price, image, description, status, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user) VALUES(#{name},#{categoryId},#{price},#{image},#{description},#{status},#{createTime},#{updateTime},#{createUser},#{updateUser})
mapper.update:
update product
name = #{name},
category_id = #{categoryId},
price = #{price},
image = #{image},
description = #{description},
status = #{status},
update_user = #{updateUser},
update_time = #{updateTime},
where id = #{id}
